# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Changes

- Describe the main changes.

## Tests Run

```text
pytest -q
```

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or generated synthetic demo images if this changes the viewer
or rendered outputs.

## Checklist

- [ ] No patient data is included.
- [ ] No proprietary SDKs are included.
- [ ] No vendor binaries are included.
- [ ] No private format documentation is included.
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes.
- [ ] Documentation is updated if needed.
